extra.provenance: Reconstructed from stdout of an actual run on 2026-04-20 on RunPod A6000. Pod was terminated before the checked-in fork_smoke_test.py script existed, so this receipt was hand-assembled from the run's real captured metrics (timings, per-branch text, pod info). Re-run demos/fork_smoke_test.py --json-out ... to emit a fresh self-verifying receipt.
extra.note: Subprocess-worker path was not validated on A6000 — parent engine (~40 GB) + N workers OOMs on 48 GB. Requires ≥80 GB GPU. See parallel_agents.py / rl_rollout_simulator.py receipts once the H100 run completes.
